message:
refactor: split runtime.zig into focused modules

Extract from runtime.zig (2449 → 1316 lines, 46% reduction):
- runtime/exceptions.zig: PythonError, ExceptionTypeId, 37 exception types
- runtime/int_ops.zig: parseIntUnicode, toInt, divideInt, etc.
- runtime/float_ops.zig: floatFromHex, floatFloor, toFloat, etc.

All functions re-exported from runtime.zig for backward compatibility.
